agents.summary: 2 LLMs responded. Total findings before dedup: 0. mistral-large-latest: 0 findings (0ms). llama-3.3-70b-versatile: 0 findings (0ms). Final after dedup: 0 findings.

findings.quote: The Company may terminate this Agreement immediately at any time, with or without cause, and without penalty.
findings.advice: Negotiate for a notice period or severance package to protect against sudden termination without compensation.

findings.quote: Early termination by the Consultant shall result in a penalty fee equal to 50% of total fees paid to date.
findings.advice: Request removal or reduction of the penalty fee to prevent unfair financial penalties for early termination.

findings.quote: The Company reserves the right to withhold or reduce payment if, in its sole discretion, the work product does not meet the Companyʼs subjective standards of quality
findings.advice: Establish clear, objective quality standards and a dispute resolution process to prevent unfair payment withholding.

findings.quote: Consultant agrees that all work, ideas, inventions, and code created during the term of this Agreement—whether created during business hours or on the Consultantʼs personal time—shall be the sole and exclusive property of the Company.
findings.advice: Limit intellectual property assignment to work created within the scope of the project and during work hours to protect personal inventions and ideas.

findings.quote: Consultant hereby assigns to the Company all rights to any intellectual property the Consultant developed prior to this Agreement that is in any way related to the Companyʼs business
findings.advice: Remove this clause to prevent the loss of pre-existing intellectual property rights and potential future income.

findings.quote: The Consultant agrees to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Company from any and all claims, damages, losses, and expenses (including legal fees) arising out of the Consultantʼs work, regardless of whether the Company was partially at fault.
findings.advice: Limit indemnification to cases where the Consultant is solely at fault to prevent unfair liability for Company-related errors.

findings.quote: The Companyʼs total liability to the Consultant under this Agreement for any cause whatsoever shall not exceed the total fees paid to the Consultant in the one (1) month preceding the claim.
findings.advice: Increase the liability cap to a reasonable amount to ensure the Company takes responsibility for its actions and provides adequate compensation for damages.

findings.quote: For a period of three (3) years following the termination of this Agreement, the Consultant shall not work for, consult with, or own any interest in any business that competes with the Company anywhere in the world.
findings.advice: Negotiate a narrower non-compete clause, limiting the scope to the specific services provided and the geographic area where the Company operates.

findings.quote: The Consultant agrees to pay all costs associated with the arbitration, including the Companyʼs legal fees, regardless of the outcome.
findings.advice: Request a more balanced arbitration cost-sharing arrangement to prevent unfair financial burdens on the Consultant.

agents.summary: 2 LLMs responded. Total findings before dedup: 9. mistral-large-latest: 0 findings (0ms). llama-3.3-70b-versatile: 9 findings (0ms). Final after dedup: 12 findings.

findings.advice: Job title and detailed role description should be added
Probation period should be specified, typically 3-6 months
Department and reporting structure should be included
Start date and work location should be specified
Working hours per day/week should be defined, with a maximum of 48 hours/week
Paid leave entitlements, including Casual Leave, Sick Leave, and Earned Leave, should be outlined
Maternity Leave and Paternity Leave policies should be included
Public holidays should be specified
Grievance redressal mechanism should be established
Statement of compliance with applicable labour laws, including Industrial Disputes Act, Payment of Wages Act, and Minimum Wages Act, should be included

findings.quote: The Company may terminate this Agreement immediately at any time, with or without cause, and without penalty
findings.advice: Notice period for both employer and employee should be more balanced, typically 30-90 days

findings.quote: The Consultant may only terminate this Agreement upon providing one hundred and twenty (120) days' written notice
findings.advice: Notice period for the consultant could be negotiated to be more reasonable, considering the industry standards

findings.quote: Early termination by the Consultant shall result in a penalty fee equal to 50% of total fees paid to date
findings.advice: Penalty fee for early termination by the consultant could be negotiated to be more reasonable

findings.quote: Payment shall be made Net-90 days after the Company has received payment from its own clients for the relevant project
findings.advice: Payment terms could be negotiated to ensure more timely payments to the consultant

findings.quote: The Company reserves the right to withhold or reduce payment if, in its sole discretion, the work product does not meet the Company's subjective standards of quality
findings.advice: Payment terms could be negotiated to include more objective quality standards

findings.quote: The Consultant shall bear all expenses incurred in the performance of services
findings.advice: Expenses could be negotiated to be reimbursed by the company or included in the compensation package

findings.quote: Consultant agrees that all work, ideas, inventions, and code created during the term of this Agreement shall be the sole and exclusive property of the Company
findings.advice: Intellectual property rights could be negotiated to ensure the consultant retains some rights to their work

findings.quote: Consultant hereby assigns to the Company all rights to any intellectual property the Consultant developed prior to this Agreement
findings.advice: Assignment of pre-existing intellectual property rights could be negotiated to be more limited in scope

findings.quote: For a period of three (3) years following the termination of this Agreement, the Consultant shall not work for, consult with, or own any interest in any business that competes with the Company anywhere in the world
findings.advice: Non-compete clause could be negotiated to be more reasonable in terms of geographic scope and duration

findings.quote: Breach of this section shall result in immediate liquidated damages of $50,000 USD payable by the Consultant to the Company
findings.advice: Liquidated damages for breach of non-compete clause could be negotiated to be more reasonable

findings.quote: The Consultant agrees to pay all costs associated with the arbitration, including the Company's legal fees, regardless of the outcome
findings.advice: Dispute resolution terms could be negotiated to ensure a more balanced allocation of costs
